name: MEMSensing Microsystems (Suzhou, China) Co., Ltd.
summary: MEMSensing Microsystems (Suzhou, China) Co., Ltd. provides MEMS sensor products and solutions in China. The company offers MEMS microphones, pressure sensors, and inertial sensors for various industries, including consumer electronics, industrial control, medical electronics and automotive, etc. It also provides MEMS design services. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Suzhou, China.
